title: P0 fix：日卡嚴格裁切為 7 天（今天+6），視覺完整回滾至 3622a0a 驗收版
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: User review REJECTED the previous card's visible outcome. The horizon-alignment card made all 8 rendered days clickable, but the correct product answer is: never render 8 days. The 8th entry is only the partial-day residue of CWA's evening issuance (12-hourly slots crossing midnight) — not a full-day forecast; the official CWA site shows 7 days. Squeezing 8 cells also wrecked the approved card visuals (narrower cells, ugly boxes/gridline emphasis). Management acknowledges the previous card's acceptance criterion pointed the wrong direction.
context.product_spec: The week is exactly: today (current weather day) + 6 following days = 7 cards, anchored to Asia/Taipei today. The leftmost card IS today.
context.visual_baseline: The approved look is the day-card-refinement version — inspect it with: git show 3622a0a:frontend/src/components/ForecastView.tsx and git show 3622a0a:frontend/src/index.css. Restore that card styling exactly (widths, spacing, typography); remove the extra box/gridline affordance added later — the 點選任一天 hint copy is sufficient affordance.

in_scope: T1 backend: trim the daily cards to exactly today..today+6 (Asia/Taipei) — discard any partial 8th-day residue from the rolling CWA horizon; days array length is at most 7
T2 frontend: heading returns to the fixed 本週預報（共 7 天）(no dynamic count)

T3 frontend visual revert: day-card styling restored to the 3622a0a approved baseline — same cell width/spacing/typography, no added borders/boxes/gridline emphasis introduced by the horizon card; with 7 cells the single-row no-scrollbar desktop layout returns naturally

T4 KEEP (do not revert): inline day-click error resilience (no page reset), the backend loose pre-screen + horizon validation (now a dormant defense since only 7 days render), the 點選任一天 hint copy, pinned 72h chart, exact sunrise, selected-state styling from selected-state-polish
T5 tests: days array capped at 7 anchored today; last card (today+6) clickable end-to-end; visual-structure assertions updated back to the 7-card baseline
out_of_scope: Any new features or styling beyond the revert

requirements: R1: Asia/Taipei anchoring, no hardcoded dates, tolerant parsing preserved
R2: Mock mode intact (already 7 days anchored today)
R3: English-only code comments; no secrets
R4: No regression of kept behaviors listed in T4
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: Live mode renders exactly 7 day cards (today..today+6) even while CWA's horizon contains an 8th partial day; heading reads 共 7 天
AC3: Day-card visuals match the 3622a0a baseline (cell width/spacing/typography; no extra borders/gridlines) — verify by diffing rendered structure/classes against git show 3622a0a
AC4: The last card (today+6) is clickable and returns correct advice/sunrise; day-click failure still shows inline error without reset
AC5: Changes committed per-AC and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Live-mode town codes are CWA-sourced (e.g. cwa-65000110); read from live /api/towns before manual testing.
Live fact at dispatch: upstream weekly horizon currently spans 7/5..7/12 (8 calendar days) — perfect condition to verify the 7-day trim.
Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; clean up any verification servers afterward.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Cap the week at exactly 7 cards (today+6, discarding CWA's partial 8th-day residue), restore the approved 3622a0a card visuals and fixed 共 7 天 heading, drop the added gridline emphasis, and keep only the invisible defenses (inline click-error handling, loose backend window) from the horizon card.
next_task_hint: Remaining: deploy auth -> actual public-URL deploy, Gemini decision, submission polish. Deadline 2026-07-06 12:00.
